install: sudo apt-get update -qq && sudo apt-get install -y -qq docker.io && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && git submodule update --init --recursive && { command -v $HOME/.foundry/bin/forge >/dev/null 2>&1 || { curl -sL https://foundry.paradigm.xyz | bash && $HOME/.foundry/bin/foundryup; }; } && $HOME/.foundry/bin/forge build && { grep -q FORK_URL $HOME/.bashrc || echo 'export FORK_URL=https://ethereum-rpc.publicnode.com' >> $HOME/.bashrc; }
start: sudo bash -c 'if ! pgrep -x dockerd >/dev/null; then nohup dockerd --storage-driver=vfs >/var/log/dockerd.log 2>&1 & fi; for i in $(seq 1 30); do [ -S /var/run/docker.sock ] && break; sleep 1; done; chmod 666 /var/run/docker.sock && docker info >/dev/null'
